---
name: Playtest feedback
description: Structured feedback from an outside playtest session
title: "[Playtest]: "
labels: [playtest, feedback]
assignees: []
---

## Tester profile

- Device / browser:
- Input: mouse / touch / trackpad / keyboard
- Prior tower-defense experience: none / casual / familiar
- Session length:

## Session result

- Time to first tower placed:
- Time to first wave sent:
- Level reached:
- Result: win / loss / quit / still playing
- Did the tester use Intel Codex? yes / no
- Did the tester use at least one spell? yes / no
- Did the tester try mobile landscape? yes / no

## Clarity feedback

- Was the main menu clear?
- Did tower placement make sense?
- Did wave start make sense?
- Did upgrade/sell make sense?
- Did enemy traits or counters make sense?

## Balance feedback

- Level 1 felt: too easy / fair / too hard
- Strongest tower:
- Weakest or most confusing tower:
- Hardest wave:
- Did spells feel worth the gold cost?

## Polish feedback

- Spell / explosion feedback rating 1-5:
- Sound feedback rating 1-5:
- UI readability rating 1-5:
- Mobile touch comfort rating 1-5:

## Retention

- Would play one more level? yes / maybe / no
- Would try Endless or Daily again? yes / maybe / no
- Biggest requested change:

## Issues observed

List bugs or confusing moments with S0/S1/S2/S3 severity when possible.
